items.title: Clickstream Analytics Market Projected to Exceed USD 1.71 Billion by 2025 | Straits Research
items.author: N/A
items.description: The global clickstream analytics market is projected to grow from $1.71 billion in 2025 to $4.84 billion by 2033, driven by the rise of e-commerce and the trend of predictive marketing. North America and Europe are expected to be the key regional markets.

items.title: Telecom Analytics Market Analysis, 2025-2030: Revenues Reached $7.07 Billion in 2024, and are Forecast to Cross $16.2 Billion by 2030
items.author: Na
items.description: The global telecom analytics market is expected to grow at a CAGR of 14.9% from 2025 to 2030, reaching $16.21 billion by 2030. The Asia-Pacific region is expected to see the highest growth, driven by increasing investments in advanced technologies like IoT and Big Data.
